summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trust Certificate Units feature. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all dialogs, cards, and table rendering correctly. Minor console warnings about React hydration (non-blocking).

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> inside tbody - This is a cosmetic console warning, table renders correctly

backend_api: GET /api/trust-units/summary - Returns settings, certificates, and aggregates (200)
GET /api/trust-units/summary - Settings include total_authorized_units, unit_label, allow_fractional
POST /api/trust-units/certificates - Creates new certificate with sequential numbering (CU-XXX)
POST /api/trust-units/certificates - Validates units don't exceed authorized total
PATCH /api/trust-units/certificates/{id} - Can change status to cancelled
Summary aggregates: total_issued_units equals sum of active certificates
frontend_ui: Units nav item appears in sidebar
Units page loads with 'Certificate Units' title
Summary cards display: Total Authorized, Issued Units, Remaining, Active Certificates
Certificates table renders with proper columns (Certificate #, Holder, Units, Percentage, Status, Actions)
Settings dialog shows: Total Authorized Units, Unit Label, Allow Fractional switch
Issue Certificate dialog has: Holder Name, Holder Identifier, Units, Issue Date, Notes inputs
Transfer button visible (disabled when no active certificates)
Unit Settings info panel displays at bottom of page

critical_code_review_comments: Backend Trust Units endpoints are fully implemented with proper validation (units authorization limits, fractional validation)
Certificate numbering uses sequential pattern CU-XXX which correctly increments
Transfer API properly cancels source certificate and creates new certificates for both parties
Frontend TrustUnitsPage has comprehensive data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Minor React warning about <span> wrapper inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_ prefixed certificates and transfers for testing - cleanup handled by test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Certificate Units feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints tested: GET /trust-units/summary, PATCH /trust-units/settings, POST /trust-units/certificates, PATCH /trust-units/certificates/{id}, POST /trust-units/transfers. Frontend /units page verified with all dialogs (Settings, Issue Certificate, Transfer) working. Demo user may need to click 'USE DEMO DATA' on first login to create a trust. Existing test data: Smith Family Trust with certificates CU-002 (5 units), CU-004 (24 units), CU-005 (1 unit).

trust_units_settings.validation: Cannot reduce total_authorized_units below currently issued

unit_transfers.flow: Cancels source cert, creates new certs for both parties
unit_transfers.validation: Source holder must have active cert with sufficient units

frontend_page.nav_item: Units link in sidebar under Structures group
